title: aulomyrcia variabilis
intro: Aulomyrcia variabilis, also known as the variable myrtle, is a plant species belonging to the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the Amazon rainforest and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aulomyrcia variabilis include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Aulomyrcia variabilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically in creams and ointments for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
